endpoints.name: Get list of suggested terms and attributes similar to the search term
endpoints.description: Lists the suggested terms and attributes similar to the search term.

endpoints.name: Get list of banners registered for query
endpoints.description: Lists the banners registered for a given query. Check the [configuring banners documentation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/4ViKEivLJtJsvpaW0aqIQ5) for a full explanation of the banner feature.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACETS}} with a real facets.

endpoints.name: Get attempt of correction of a misspelled term
endpoints.description: Tries to correct a misspelled term from the search.

endpoints.name: Get list of the possible facets for a given query
endpoints.description: Lists the possible facets for a given query
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACETS}} with a real facets.

endpoints.name: Get list of products for a query
endpoints.description: Lists the products for a given query.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACETS}} with a real facets.

endpoints.name: Get list of suggested terms similar to the search term
endpoints.description: Lists suggested terms similar to the search term.

endpoints.name: Get list of the 10 most searched terms
